title: Noli Me Tangere
author: Jose Rizal
summary: A social novel that follows Crisostomo Ibarra as he returns to the Philippines and confronts corruption, injustice, and colonial abuse.

title: El Filibusterismo
author: Jose Rizal
summary: A darker sequel centered on Simoun, whose plans for revenge expose the despair and unrest beneath colonial society.

title: Florante at Laura
author: Francisco Balagtas
summary: A metrical romance of love, betrayal, exile, and honor, written as an enduring classic of Philippine literature.

title: Ibong Adarna
author: Anonymous
summary: A folk epic about three princes who search for a magical bird whose song can heal their ailing father.

title: The Little Prince
author: Antoine de Saint-Exupery
summary: A poetic tale about a young traveler from another planet, exploring friendship, wonder, loneliness, and what adults often forget.

title: Pride and Prejudice
author: Jane Austen
summary: A sharp comedy of manners following Elizabeth Bennet, family expectations, first impressions, and the slow correction of prejudice.
